Oriental Mixed Box 10 sachets (ONLINE EXCLUSIVE)

Ultimate Taste, Aromatic Coffee and Tea

【Premium Coffee Bean, Aromatic and Mellow】































































Tastes Great when Crafted with Love































































This is the product concept of Oriental Kopi’s White Coffee. To crafting the finest quality white coffee, Oriental Kopi concerned with every detail and its ingredients to ensure each cup of white coffee can completely preserve its aroma and rich in flavours.































































Premium Quality comes with High Standard































































Blended with golden ratio of premium Arabica and "Robusta” beans for perfectly balanced coffee. After hours of low-temperature roasting, each cup of Oriental White Coffee is extraordinary rich and bold aroma, it has a heightened lingering mouth feel































































Preparation:































Pour the stick contents into your cup. Add 170ml hot water. Stir and enjoy!































































Storage:































Store in a cool, dry place. Please drink immediately after opening the sachet

Prawn Mee 虾面 5 servings

✔ Essence of Fresh Prawn: Our rich broth is crafted by simmering fresh prawns and chicken bones over time, creating a flavorful base that is spicy, sweet, and savory, with each sip carrying the rich aroma of prawns.

✔ Springy Noodle Texture: Made from premium high-gluten flour and prepared with traditional techniques, our noodles have a springy texture that perfectly complements the fresh prawn flavor.

✔ Easy and convenience: Ready in just 5 minutes, you can easily enjoy these delicious, spicy-sweet prawn noodles at home, immersing yourself in their fresh, rich flavor.

Ingredient: Wheat Flour, Corn Starch, Rock Salt, Palm Oil,Water, Onion, Chilli, Shrimp, Salt, Shallot,Flavour Enhancer

✔ Halal

Curry Laksa Mi 咖喱叻沙 5 servings

✔ Spicy and Rich Curry Laksa: Crafted from a blend of 8 premium spices—including chili, galangal, garlic, lemongrass, and more—combined with fresh coconut milk and curry leaves,

this broth offers a bold and aromatic taste. Every sip bursts with the rich, spicy flavors of curry laksa!

✔ Springy Noodle Texture: Made from high-quality high-gluten flour and prepared using traditional techniques, our noodles have a perfectly springy texture, with a silky texture that perfectly complements the rich curry laksa.

✔ Easy and Convenient: Ready in just 5 minutes, this spicy and flavorful curry laksa can be enjoyed effortlessly at home. Pair it with tofu puffs, fish cakes, egg, and other toppings for an irresistible meal.

Ingredient: Wheat Flour, Corn Starch, Rock Salt, Palm Oil,Water, Onion, Chilli, Lemongrass, Sugar, Garlic,Spices, Shrimp, Salt, Curry Powder, Flavour Enhancer

✔ Halal

Storage Condition: Store at cool and dry place.

Cooking Method:

1. Pour in 2 cups (400ml) of water andadd the seasoning sauce.

2. Once the water boils, add the noodle andcook on medium-high heat for 4 ~ 5 minutes.

Additional Tips:

For Better Flavours, could be served withside dishes according to your preference!

product.desc:
[Authentic/Direct from Oriental/Superior Taste Award 3 Star Award Winning Coffee]

Oriental Teh Tarik 华阳经典奶茶 10 x 40g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets

✔A perfect smooth blend of the Classic Teh Tarik

✔ Suitable for tea lovers who love rich, creamy, aromatic milk tea

✔ Halal

Oriental Kopi Classic White Coffee 华阳经典白咖啡 10 x 38g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g































































✔A perfect smooth blend of the Classic White Coffee

✔ Suitable for coffee lovers who love rich, creamy, aromatic white coffee































































✔ Halal

Oriental Kopi White Coffee No Sugar Added 华阳无糖白咖啡 10 x 32g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 32g

✔ Strong aromatic coffee with No Sugar Added White Coffee

✔ Suitable for sugar-free white coffee lovers, who love rich, creamy, aromatic coffee































































✔ Halal

Oriental Kopi Roasted White Coffee 华阳炭烧白咖啡 10 x 40g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 40g































































✔ Sweet and mellow, with slight bitterness

✔ Suitable for coffee lovers who love slight bitter taste

✔ Halal































































Oriental Kopi Mocha White Coffee 华阳摩卡白咖啡 10 x 40g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 40g

✔ The #New 𝑴𝒐𝒄𝒉𝒂 is ready to meet you Serving you a great blend of Coffee and Mocha, so smooth and milky! A balanced flavour in every sip 😋

✔ 𝑶𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒕𝒂𝒍 𝑴𝒐𝒄𝒉𝒂 made with the finest blend of [Arabica] and [Robusta] beans perfectly roasted and blended with Belgium Cocoa to brew a cup of mocha with a unique flavour!

✔ The perfect coffee drink to refresh you any time of the day. With every mouthwatering sip, experience smooth, great-tasting coffee with a dash of cocoa.

✔ Halal

Oriental Kopi Himalayan Salt White Coffee 喜马拉雅岩盐白咖啡 10 x 38g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g

✔ The addition of Himalayan rock salt balances the bitterness of the coffee, bringing out coffee richness and enhancing the overall taste of the beverage!

✔ Halal

Oriental Kopi Hazelnut White Coffee 华阳榛果白咖啡 10 x 40g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 40g

✔  Ultimate Taste, Aromatic Coffee

✔  The mix of 3 specialty coffee beans Arabica, Robusta, and Liberica blend with Hazelnut to brew a cup of Hazelnut White Coffee with a unique flavour! Roasted for hours at medium-low temperature, each cup of Oriental Hazelnut White Coffee is rich and fragrant, and exudes the unique and nutty flavour of Hazelnut!

✔  Halal

Oriental Kopi Drip Coffee 华阳品味级黑咖啡 10x18g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 18g

✔  A rich and mellow Oriental Black Coffee! Blended with the finest Arabica, Robusta and Liberica coffee beans, roasted in high temperature to perfection. Skilfully roasted perfectly to exudes coffee aroma, comes with a mellow, richer taste and lingering flavours.

✔  Halal

Oriental White Coffee Extra Kaw 华阳特浓白咖啡 10 x 40g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 40g

✔ Extra Rich taste, Aromatic Coffee

✔ Perfect blend of fine Arabica coffee beans and Robusta coffee beans. Slow roasted in high temperature, each cup of Oriental Kopi Kaw is extra rich, mellow & aromatic with an endless aftertaste!

✔  Halal

Oriental Royal Chocolate 华阳皇家巧克力 10 x 38g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g

✔ Rich and aromatic, smooth and silky!

✔ Crafted with premium Belgian chocolate, our Royal Chocolate boasts exceptional flavor and a smooth, velvety texture. Each sip offers a rich cocoa aroma, perfect for both hot and cold beverages. Elegantly packaged, it makes a perfect gift or a luxurious treat for yourself. Savor the unparalleled taste of Belgian chocolate and experience true indulgence!

✔  Halal

Oriental Teh Halia 姜奶茶 10 x 38g

SMOOTH AND FRAGRANT GINGER TEA

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g

✔ Made from the finest quality Ceylon blacktea, sourced from Sri Lanka's tea mountains and roasted at high temperatures to intensify its rich and bold aroma.

✔ The addition of ginger introduces a subtle of spiciness, perfectly complementing the tea’s fragrance. This delightful drink offers a smooth, velvety texture with a layered flavour thats comforting. Enjoy a cup of our Ginger Milk Tea for a comforting and refreshing experience!

Oriental Cham 鸳鸯 10 x 38g

Ultimate Taste, Aromatic Coffee

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g

✔ Indulge in the perfect harmony of rich, aromatic coffee with smooth and sweet milktea.

✔ The finest coffee beans are meticulously roasted at low temperatures to preserve their full flavour, resulting in a delightful combination of coffee and tea aroma in every sip. Experience the unique and delicious taste sensation of Cham.

【NEW ARRIVAL】 Musang King White Coffee 猫山王白咖啡 10 x 38g

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets x 38g

✔ Premium Musang King Durian - Carefully selected premium Musang King durians are blended into rich white coffee, delivering the perfect match of the King of Fruits’ distinctive aroma and creamy texture.

✔ Every sip is bold, smooth, and brings out the essence of authentic Malaysian flavour!

✔ Blend with Three Premium Coffee Beans - A fine selection of three high quality coffee beans #Arabica, #Robusta, and #Liberica meticulously blended and roasted to create a rich, smooth, and aromatic coffee with a distinct, full bodied flavour.

✔ Craftsmanship & Authentic Taste - Crafted using traditional Malaysian techniques, this exceptional blend of Musang King durian and white coffee offers a truly distinctive and iconic taste. Whether enjoyed personally or given as a thoughtful gift, it’s the perfect showcase of Malaysia’s finest local flavour.

Oriental Mixed Box 10 sachets (ONLINE EXCLUSIVE)

Ultimate Taste, Aromatic Coffee and Tea

Box Size: 10 single-serve sachets

✔ Indulge in the perfect mix of flavours, with 10 different varieties

✔ Each box consist of one sachet of classic, charcoal roasted, no sugar added, teh tarik, himalayan salt, hazelnut, teh halia, cham, mocha and MSW coffee each

【Premium Coffee Bean, Aromatic and Mellow】































































Tastes Great when Crafted with Love































































This is the product concept of Oriental Kopi’s White Coffee. To crafting the finest quality white coffee, Oriental Kopi concerned with every detail and its ingredients to ensure each cup of white coffee can completely preserve its aroma and rich in flavours.































































Premium Quality comes with High Standard































































Blended with golden ratio of premium Arabica and "Robusta” beans for perfectly balanced coffee. After hours of low-temperature roasting, each cup of Oriental White Coffee is extraordinary rich and bold aroma, it has a heightened lingering mouth feel































































Preparation:































Pour the stick contents into your cup. Add 170ml hot water. Stir and enjoy!































































Storage:































Store in a cool, dry place. Please drink immediately after opening the sachet

Prawn Mee 虾面 5 servings

✔ Essence of Fresh Prawn: Our rich broth is crafted by simmering fresh prawns and chicken bones over time, creating a flavorful base that is spicy, sweet, and savory, with each sip carrying the rich aroma of prawns.

✔ Springy Noodle Texture: Made from premium high-gluten flour and prepared with traditional techniques, our noodles have a springy texture that perfectly complements the fresh prawn flavor.

✔ Easy and convenience: Ready in just 5 minutes, you can easily enjoy these delicious, spicy-sweet prawn noodles at home, immersing yourself in their fresh, rich flavor.

Ingredient: Wheat Flour, Corn Starch, Rock Salt, Palm Oil,Water, Onion, Chilli, Shrimp, Salt, Shallot,Flavour Enhancer

✔ Halal

Curry Laksa Mi 咖喱叻沙 5 servings

✔ Spicy and Rich Curry Laksa: Crafted from a blend of 8 premium spices—including chili, galangal, garlic, lemongrass, and more—combined with fresh coconut milk and curry leaves,

this broth offers a bold and aromatic taste. Every sip bursts with the rich, spicy flavors of curry laksa!

✔ Springy Noodle Texture: Made from high-quality high-gluten flour and prepared using traditional techniques, our noodles have a perfectly springy texture, with a silky texture that perfectly complements the rich curry laksa.

✔ Easy and Convenient: Ready in just 5 minutes, this spicy and flavorful curry laksa can be enjoyed effortlessly at home. Pair it with tofu puffs, fish cakes, egg, and other toppings for an irresistible meal.

Ingredient: Wheat Flour, Corn Starch, Rock Salt, Palm Oil,Water, Onion, Chilli, Lemongrass, Sugar, Garlic,Spices, Shrimp, Salt, Curry Powder, Flavour Enhancer

✔ Halal

Storage Condition: Store at cool and dry place.

Cooking Method:

1. Pour in 2 cups (400ml) of water andadd the seasoning sauce.

2. Once the water boils, add the noodle andcook on medium-high heat for 4 ~ 5 minutes.

Additional Tips:

For Better Flavours, could be served withside dishes according to your preference!

items.answer: Dear Customer. there are 3 main methods of processing the coffee beans (the seeds) from the coffee cherry fruit. Washed, Natural-processed, and Honey-processed. The word "honey" is just a terminology used to describe the sticky and gooey coffee cherry fruit as it dries in the sun, with its skin peeled off. So there is no honey actually added at any point. The final beans are roasted medium or medium plus, and are dry, not oily or sticky.

Richboy Blue Mountain 3 in 1 coffee seeks to emulate the taste profile of renowned Jamaican Blue Mountain by blending several batches of premium grade Arabica coffees and roast them gently. Our roast profile is on the lighter side to bring out the creamy-smooth mouth feel with a hint of sweetness, giving you the prized taste of Blue Mountain, but at a huge fraction of the cost. It is a 3 in 1 coffee, premix with creamer and sugar to enhance the taste of coffee, delicious by itself! Our roast profile is on the lighter side to bring out the creamy-smooth mouth feel with a hint of sweetness, giving you the prized taste of Blue Mountain, but at a huge fraction of the cost. It is a 3 in 1 coffee, premix with creamer and sugar to enhance the taste of coffee, delicious by itself!

Richboy Blue Mountain 3 in 1 coffee, a coffee that awakens your taste bud and lives up to its name

product.desc:
Colombian Beans emit indulging floral hints, traces of tropical fruits, red berries or apples and a sweetness akin to chocolate, sugar cane or strong caramel sweetness, perhaps with a nutty undertone.

Colombian Coffees are medium-bodied with a rich taste and citrus-like acidity.

The best high-grown Colombian coffee typifies the classic Latin American mild, fruity flavor though not the type of fruity taste that seems almost fermented.

items.answer:
Hi Mary K.
The following are the acidity ratings from lowest to highest.
Low < Light < Mild < Mellow < Moderate < Bright
As for your second question,

while our Brazilian beans have ‘low' acidity.

3380202668.title: ZEN Blend | 100% Arabica Coffee Beans - Floral, Smooth, Tangy, Bright Acidity, Medium Body
3380202668.detail_text: Coffee Properties: 100% Arabica Taste note :Floral, Smooth, Tangy Columbia Supremo, Ethiopia Sidamo Roast : City Roast Body :Medium Acidity : Bright Weight: 250 Grams / 500 Grams Indulge in a rich and aromatic coffee experience with this 100% Arabica blend. Featuring beans from two renowned coffee-growing regions, Colombia Supremo and Ethiopia Sidamo, this blend is a perfect combination of floral, smooth, and tangy taste notes that will awaken your senses. This coffee boasts a delightful floral aroma that is sure to captivate your senses. With each sip, you'll enjoy a smooth and velvety texture that complements the tangy acidity and bright finish. The bright acidity is a standout feature, bringing a crisp and refreshing quality to the cup. The blend's medium body offers a balance between light and heavy, making it an easy and enjoyable choice for any time of day. The City Roast brings out the unique characteristics of each origin, creating a harmonious blend of flavors that is perfectly balanced. The Colombian Supremo adds a rich and smooth character to the blend, with notes of milk chocolate and caramel. The Ethiopia Sidamo provides the tangy and bright notes with a hint of citrus, enhancing the overall complexity of the coffee. This coffee is perfect for those who love a bright and flavorful cup, with a touch of floral sweetness that lingers long after the last sip. Whether enjoyed black or with a dash of cream, this coffee is sure to delight and satisfy any coffee lover's palate.

product.desc:
Coffee Properties:

  • 100% Arabica
  • Taste note :Floral, Smooth, Tangy
  • Columbia Supremo, Ethiopia Sidamo
  • Roast : City Roast
  • Body :Medium
  • Acidity : Bright
  • Weight: 250 Grams / 500 Grams

Indulge in a rich and aromatic coffee experience with this 100% Arabica blend. Featuring beans from two renowned coffee-growing regions, Colombia Supremo and Ethiopia Sidamo, this blend is a perfect combination of floral, smooth, and tangy taste notes that will awaken your senses.

This coffee boasts a delightful floral aroma that is sure to captivate your senses. With each sip, you'll enjoy a smooth and velvety texture that complements the tangy acidity and bright finish. The bright acidity is a standout feature, bringing a crisp and refreshing quality to the cup.

The blend's medium body offers a balance between light and heavy, making it an easy and enjoyable choice for any time of day. The City Roast brings out the unique characteristics of each origin, creating a harmonious blend of flavors that is perfectly balanced.

The Colombian Supremo adds a rich and smooth character to the blend, with notes of milk chocolate and caramel. The Ethiopia Sidamo provides the tangy and bright notes with a hint of citrus, enhancing the overall complexity of the coffee.

This coffee is perfect for those who love a bright and flavorful cup, with a touch of floral sweetness that lingers long after the last sip. Whether enjoyed black or with a dash of cream, this coffee is sure to delight and satisfy any coffee lover's palate.

SUPER Instant White Coffee Mix | 2in1 & 3in1 Coffee - 15s / 22s Sticks Creamy Rich Aroma Coffee

Product Highlights

Rich & Creamy Coffee Blend – Enjoy a smooth and satisfying coffee experience anytime

Convenient Instant Mix – Easy-to-prepare coffee sachets for home, office, or travel

White Coffee, 2in1 & 3in1 Coffee Variants Available – Choose your preferred coffee taste and sweetness level

Aromatic Coffee Flavor – Delicious coffee aroma with a balanced creamy texture

Detailed Description

Enjoy a comforting cup of coffee anytime with SUPER Instant Coffee Mix! Crafted for coffee lovers who enjoy a smooth, creamy, and aromatic beverage, this instant coffee blend is perfect for busy mornings, office breaks, or relaxing evenings at home.

Available in both 2in1 and 3in1 variants, SUPER Instant White Coffee offers a rich coffee taste with a creamy finish that many coffee drinkers enjoy. Each sachet is individually packed for convenience and freshness, making it easy to prepare wherever you are.

Whether you prefer a less sweet coffee or a creamier blend, SUPER Instant Coffee Mix provides a delicious and convenient coffee experience in every cup.

Key Features

Type: Instant Coffee Mix

Variants:White Coffee / 2in1 & 3in1 Coffee

Packaging Options: 15 Sticks / 22 Sticks

Flavor Profile: Rich, Creamy, Smooth Coffee Aroma

Preparation: Just add hot water

Suitable For: Home, office, travel, and daily coffee enjoyment

How It Works

SUPER Instant White Coffee Mix combines premium coffee blend, creamer, and sugar (for 3in1 variants) into convenient instant sachets. Simply pour the contents into a cup, add hot water, stir well, and enjoy a flavorful coffee beverage in seconds.

Benefits

✔ Convenient and easy-to-prepare instant coffee

✔ Smooth and creamy coffee flavor many users enjoy

✔ Individually sealed sachets help maintain freshness

✔ Suitable for busy lifestyles and on-the-go preparation

✔ Great for coffee lovers looking for a quick beverage option

Available in both 2in1 and 3in1 variants, SUPER Instant White Coffee offers a rich coffee taste with a creamy finish that many coffee drinkers enjoy. Each sachet is individually packed for convenience and freshness, making it easy to prepare wherever you are.

Whether you prefer a less sweet coffee or a creamier blend, SUPER Instant Coffee Mix provides a delicious and convenient coffee experience in every cup.

Key Features

Type: Instant Coffee Mix

Variants:White Coffee / 2in1 & 3in1 Coffee

Packaging Options: 15 Sticks / 22 Sticks

Flavor Profile: Rich, Creamy, Smooth Coffee Aroma

Preparation: Just add hot water

Suitable For: Home, office, travel, and daily coffee enjoyment

How It Works

SUPER Instant White Coffee Mix combines premium coffee blend, creamer, and sugar (for 3in1 variants) into convenient instant sachets. Simply pour the contents into a cup, add hot water, stir well, and enjoy a flavorful coffee beverage in seconds.

✔ Convenient and easy-to-prepare instant coffee

✔ Smooth and creamy coffee flavor many users enjoy

✔ Individually sealed sachets help maintain freshness

✔ Suitable for busy lifestyles and on-the-go preparation

✔ Great for coffee lovers looking for a quick beverage option

13717846314.detail_text: Coffee Type：American Packaging Type：Cans Region Of Origin：Japan Authentic AGF Japanese freeze-dried instant coffee, perfect for coffee lovers who crave a rich, smooth cup anytime! Made with premium roasted coffee beans using advanced freeze-drying technology, it locks in the original aroma and flavor, delivering a café-quality taste at home. ✅ Rich & Smooth Flavor : Specially blended coffee beans create a deep, rich aroma with a smooth, well-balanced taste. Low acidity, so it’s gentle on the stomach even when enjoyed black. ✅ Freeze-Dried Technology : The freeze-drying process preserves the coffee’s natural oils and volatile flavors, resulting in a clean, full-bodied cup with no bitter aftertaste. ✅ No Additives, Pure Black Coffee : 100% pure coffee, no added sugar, cream, or artificial flavors. Perfect for those who prefer a classic black coffee or want to customize their drinks with milk, creamer, or syrups. ✅ 40 Servings Per Jar : Each 80g jar makes approximately 40 cups of coffee, great value for daily use, office, or home brewing. ✅ Easy to Brew, Any Way You Like : Dissolves instantly in hot water, or use it for iced coffee, lattes, cappuccinos, or even coffee desserts like tiramisu. Versatile for all your coffee creations!

product.desc:
Coffee Type：American

Packaging Type：Cans

Region Of Origin：Japan

Authentic AGF Japanese freeze-dried instant coffee, perfect for coffee lovers who crave a rich, smooth cup anytime! Made with premium roasted coffee beans using advanced freeze-drying technology, it locks in the original aroma and flavor, delivering a café-quality taste at home.

✅ Rich & Smooth Flavor: Specially blended coffee beans create a deep, rich aroma with a smooth, well-balanced taste. Low acidity, so it’s gentle on the stomach even when enjoyed black.

✅ Freeze-Dried Technology: The freeze-drying process preserves the coffee’s natural oils and volatile flavors, resulting in a clean, full-bodied cup with no bitter aftertaste.

✅ No Additives, Pure Black Coffee: 100% pure coffee, no added sugar, cream, or artificial flavors. Perfect for those who prefer a classic black coffee or want to customize their drinks with milk, creamer, or syrups.

✅ 40 Servings Per Jar: Each 80g jar makes approximately 40 cups of coffee, great value for daily use, office, or home brewing.

✅ Easy to Brew, Any Way You Like: Dissolves instantly in hot water, or use it for iced coffee, lattes, cappuccinos, or even coffee desserts like tiramisu. Versatile for all your coffee creations!

Pure Black 1kg Commercial Beans   With a generous 1kg bag, these commercial beans are perfect for businesses looking to serve high-quality coffee.    Italian Espresso Blend   Infused with the rich flavors of Italian espresso, this coffee delivers a bold and aromatic experience.    Brazilian Street Select   Sourced from the vibrant streets of Brazil, this coffee blend offers a unique and authentic taste.     </body></html>
